root_cause: The clean UX package preserved the Bengali Gothic shelf visually but did not preserve the legacy pipeline selectors expected by the browser regression suite.
fix_applied: Restored data-testid="pipeline-books" on the Home pipeline section while preserving the current shelf test id as an inner wrapper.
Restored pipeline-card slug test ids in ShelfTwoSlideshow.
Changed queued pipeline CTA to a safe notify/contact link instead of a disabled button.
release_truth_impact: No reader, payment, or audiobook access is exposed for queued books.
